Quality Education.reason: The course provides quality tertiary education, focusing on practical skills for employment ('學用合一') and professional judgment, aligning with Targets 4.3 and 4.4. The ESG component also touches on sustainable development knowledge (4.7).

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course prepares students for 'AVM及ESG結合' work, contributing to decent job creation (Target 8.5) and improving enterprise productivity through '成本及利潤管理' (cost and profit management), supporting economic growth (Target 8.2).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course centers on the innovative AVM system, which has an '發明專利' (invention patent) and involves '理論創新及實務創新'. The development of an AVM IT system also supports infrastructure, aligning with Targets 9.4 and 9.5.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course explicitly involves a multi-stakeholder partnership between academia (Professor Wu), a tech company (薈智科技公司), and SMEs, working together to implement AVM and ESG. This directly aligns with Targets 17.16 and 17.17.
